column3: Performance Indicator 7: Implementation of actions on non-conformities and/or observations from third-party and/or internal quality audits

7.1 Hire additional COS to focus on documentation in FOMD and implement a centralized digital filing system for accessible project communications and documents, involving all personnel.

 Findings: In view of the insufficient manpower and absence of a designated official Records Custodian, the FOMD can consider hiring a Contract of Service personnel for this task in order to keep a central control of the department and to ensure an updated digital copy of all documents and communications.
